issues.problem: Self-join uses `b.DateID = a.DateID + 1` which fails across month boundaries (20260131 + 1 = 20260132, not 20260201). Should use DATEADD on the Date column or join via Dim_Date to find next calendar day.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section with P2/P3 checkboxes. Footer says 'Phases: 11/14' without itemizing which were completed vs. skipped.
Query filters WHERE DateID = @Today but includes ORDER BY DateID DESC — redundant ordering on a single-value filter.
Promotion step from BI_DB_python to BI_DB_dbo is presented as established fact but the mechanism is unknown (no SP found, may be CTAS/RENAME/external orchestration).
No NULL-rate observations in element descriptions despite all columns being nullable and sample data showing zero NULLs.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Minor fixes only: (1) Fix Section 7.3 self-join to use DATEADD(DAY,1,a.Date) or Dim_Date instead of DateID+1 arithmetic. (2) Add Phase Gate Checklist section itemizing completed/skipped phases. (3) Qualify the staging-to-production promotion step as 'mechanism unknown' in Section 5.2. (4) Fix Section 3.2 first query pattern to remove redundant ORDER BY when filtering to a single DateID.

skipped_phases: Phase Gate Checklist section missing — cannot determine which of the 3 skipped phases were P2/P3
